raw_consumer_statement:
I canceled my XXXX XXXX XXXX Select membership prior to the renewal date and removed my credit card from the account. Despite these actions, my credit card was charged {$49.00} on XX/XX/year>, for a membership renewal I did not authorize. 

I contacted customer service and was informed by a representative ( XXXX XXXX ) that no funds were taken, and I was sent an invoice showing {$0.00}. However, my credit card statement shows the {$49.00} charge was processed. 

I requested a refund and written confirmation that my membership was canceled and no further billing would occur. Instead, I was told to call another department to resolve the issue, despite asking repeatedly to handle the matter in writing for documentation purposes. An escalation was eventually submitted ( XXXX # XXXX ), but I have yet to receive a resolution or refund. 

This is a case of unauthorized billing and unethical business practices. I am requesting that this charge be reversed and the XXXX XXXX XXXX Select billing process be reviewed for transparency and consumer protection. 

I have documentation of the charge, the cancellation, and communications with XXXX XXXX and can provide it upon request.
